title: clusia lundellii
intro: Clusia lundellii, also known as the Clusia tree or Family Tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Clusiaceae. This plant is native to Mexico and Central America, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Clusia lundellii include treating digestive issues, such as diarrhea and constipation, as well as reducing fever and relieving pain. Clusia lundellii can be prepared as a tea or tincture for herbal use, and its leaves and bark are also used in traditional medicine.
